dialog.errorFallback: Something went wrong in this dialog. Your payment entries are safe — close and try again.

SPLIT_TENDER.title: Split payment
SPLIT_TENDER.description: Take this payment with more than one method — for example cash and card together.

GIFT_CARD.title: Gift card
GIFT_CARD.description: Look up a gift card, enter its PIN if required, and apply an amount to this order.
